summary: Completed frontend testing of Reports page filters. Found and fixed a critical bug where Seller/Buyer filter dropdowns were empty due to case-sensitive type comparison. All 12 filter features now working correctly.

bugs_fixed.issue: Seller and Buyer filter dropdowns were empty - only showing 'All Sellers' and 'All Buyers'
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Case-sensitive type comparison: code used p.type === 'seller' but database has p.type === 'Seller' (capitalized)
bugs_fixed.fix_applied: Changed to String(p.type || '').toLowerCase() === 'seller' for case-insensitive comparison

passed_tests: Year filter dropdown exists with data-testid='reports-year-filter'
Seller filter dropdown populated with 27 sellers (data-testid='reports-seller-filter')
Buyer filter dropdown populated with 58 buyers (data-testid='reports-buyer-filter')
Commodity filter dropdown populated with 21 commodities (data-testid='reports-commodity-filter')
Origin filter dropdown populated with 6 origins (data-testid='reports-origin-filter')
Year 2025 shows 9 trades (all trades from 2025 including cancelled BAH55)
Year 2024 shows 0 trades with 'No data' in all charts
Clear button appears when any filter is active (data-testid='reports-clear-filter')
Clear button resets all filters to defaults (year 2026, all entities)
Combined filters work (Year 2025 + Yellow Corn = 3 trades)
KPI cards (Total Trades, Volume, Value, Commission) update when filters applied
Charts in all tabs reflect filtered data
critical_code_review_comments: Year filter logic correctly uses same pattern as Trades page: current year shows non-terminal trades from any year, past years show only trades from that year
All filter dropdowns have proper data-testid attributes for testing
filteredTrades useMemo correctly chains all filters together
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports page filters fully tested and working. Fixed bug in Seller/Buyer filter population (case-sensitive type comparison). All 9 trades are from 2025. Year 2026 shows 8 trades (excludes cancelled BAH55). Year 2025 shows all 9 trades. Year 2024 shows 0 trades. Filter test IDs: reports-year-filter, reports-seller-filter, reports-buyer-filter, reports-commodity-filter, reports-origin-filter, reports-clear-filter.
